summary: Static to CMS Migration testing for 9 pages completed. All pages now use useCms hook with MongoDB settings collection + hardcoded fallbacks. Backend: 12/12 API tests passed. Frontend: 9/9 pages load correctly with data-testid attributes. Fixed missing ArrowRight import bug in developer-toolkit. Admin CMS panel has all 9 sections under 'Core Pages' category.

minor.issue: Public CMS update endpoint returns 405 Method Not Allowed. Updates must go through /api/admin/settings/{key} which requires authentication

fixed_bugs.issue: Missing ArrowRight import from lucide-react caused page crash

PASS - Bulk fetch returns multiple sections

frontend_pages./careers: PASS - data-testid='careers-page', title='Join Our Team', positions-section visible
frontend_pages./support: PASS - data-testid='support-page', title='24/7 Smart Home Support', scenarios-section visible
frontend_pages./developer-toolkit: PASS - data-testid='developer-toolkit-page', title='Developer Partner Toolkit' (after fix)

admin_cms_sections.page_careers: PRESENT in CMS_SECTIONS array under 'pages' category
admin_cms_sections.page_media: PRESENT in CMS_SECTIONS array under 'pages' category
admin_cms_sections.page_support: PRESENT in CMS_SECTIONS array under 'pages' category
admin_cms_sections.page_warranty: PRESENT in CMS_SECTIONS array under 'pages' category
admin_cms_sections.page_developer_toolkit: PRESENT in CMS_SECTIONS array under 'pages' category
admin_cms_sections.page_privacy_policy: PRESENT in CMS_SECTIONS array under 'pages' category
admin_cms_sections.page_terms: PRESENT in CMS_SECTIONS array under 'pages' category
admin_cms_sections.page_terms_of_service: PRESENT in CMS_SECTIONS array under 'pages' category
admin_cms_sections.page_privacy: PRESENT in CMS_SECTIONS array under 'pages' category

critical_code_review_comments: Minor hydration warning in /careers page: 'Send your application to' vs 'Send your application to careers@lexalifestyle.com' - server/client text mismatch. This is cosmetic and doesn't affect functionality.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_static_to_cms_pages.py - Created test file for CMS migration
seed_data_creation: CMS data uses POST /api/cms/register-defaults endpoint for auto-seeding. Each page has hardcoded fallback content in the Content.tsx file that serves as both default display and seeding template.
context_for_next_testing_agent: 9 static pages converted to CMS-driven. Each uses useCms('page_key', fallback) hook. CMS returns {key, value} from MongoDB settings collection. If value is null, hardcoded fallback is used. Admin CMS panel at /admin/cms shows all 9 under 'Core Pages' (46) category. Update via PUT /api/admin/settings/{key} requires authentication.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Missing ArrowRight import from lucide-react at line 5 of Content.tsx
rca_of_the_issue.reproduction: Navigate to /developer-toolkit, page throws ReferenceError: ArrowRight is not defined
rca_of_the_issue.fix: Added ArrowRight to import statement: import { Download, FileText, Package, Award, CheckCircle2, Lock, ArrowRight } from 'lucide-react'
